questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a What is concept of Group Technology? 2.5 b Brief about coding system in CIM? 2.5 c Differentiate between CAD and CIMS with suitable example. 2.5 d Explain storage buffers in lines. 2.5 e What is difference in G & M Codes? 2.5 f Explain closed loop Systems with suitable example? 2.5 g What is DNC? 2.5 CO 3 h What is tooling systems? 2.5
What is computer aided process planning? What is role of process planning in CAM? 10
What is concept of part family? Explain the general methods used for part family. What is concept of cellular Manufacturing? Explain with suitable examples and diagrams. 10
Draw and explain rotary Indexing Machines. 10
Draw and explain work part transfer mechanism. 10

Brief about process planning and flow chart for part programming. Explain the concept for a part to be manufactured on a CNC turning machine. Make neat sketch of the chosen part. Brief about tool pre-setting and modular tooling. 10
What is generative Process Planning? Show the modular structure of a generative CAPP System with flow diagram. Write simple G codes with explanation for given CNC Lathe Operation. 10 2
What is automated Production Lines/Transfer Lines? Where is application of Automated Production Lines? Write advantages of Automated Production Line & Disadvantages. 10
